messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create an automotive manufacturing supply chain optimization deck for internal teams. Save it as 'Supply_Chain_Optimization.pptx', write all content in German, and use 4:3 Standard landscape slide sizes. The style should be industrial grey and red with technical diagrams. Do not call any external APIs or scrape the web; hardcode all data points locally. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE rather than ChartType for chart generation. Also, ensure you check that slide.shapes.title is not None before attempting to update its .text property.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

DARK_GREY = "#2D2D2D"
MEDIUM_GREY = "#5A5A5A"
LIGHT_GREY = "#E8E8E8"
VERY_LIGHT_GREY = "#F5F5F5"
ACCENT_RED = "#C62828"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    if bg_color is None:
        bg_color = WHITE
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p1 = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run1 = p1.add_run()
    run1.text = title
    run1.font.size = Pt(16)
    run1.font.bold = True
    run1.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)

    if body:
        tf.add_paragraph()
        p2 = tf.paragraphs[1]
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body
        run2.font.size = Pt(11)
        run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=10):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(
            MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height
        )
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY)
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Bildplatzhalter"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_GREY)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(7), Inches(1.5),
        "Automotive Supply Chain Optimierung",
        font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(7), Inches(0.6),
        "Strategische Maßnahmen für effizientere Lieferketten",
        font_size=18, bold=False, color=LIGHT_GREY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.0), Inches(4.6), Inches(2), Pt(3))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.4),
        "Internes Dokument — Supply Chain Management",
        font_size=12, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GREY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )


def slide_02_metrics(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "Aktuelle Kennzahlen")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.5),
        "Lieferketten-KPIs im Überblick",
        font_size=24, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY
    )

    card_width = Inches(3.0)
    card_height = Inches(1.8)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.9)

    add_card(slide, start_x, y_pos, card_width, card_height,
             "Liefertreue", "94,2 %\n\nSteigerung um 3,5 Prozentpunkte im Vergleich zum Vorjahr.",
             bg_color=WHITE, border_color=ACCENT_RED)

    add_card(slide, start_x + card_width + gap, y_pos, card_width, card_height,
             "Bestandsoptimierung", "18 % Reduktion\n\nDurch Just-in-Time-Steuerung und bessere Prognosen.",
             bg_color=WHITE, border_color=ACCENT_RED)

    add_card(slide, start_x + 2 * (card_width + gap), y_pos, card_width, card_height,
             "Durchlaufzeit", "12 Tage\n\nVerkürzung um 4 Tage durch Prozessoptimierung.",
             bg_color=WHITE, border_color=ACCENT_RED)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 6)


def slide_03_supplier_chart(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "Lieferantenanalyse")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.5),
        "Lieferantenperformance nach Region",
        font_size=24, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY
    )

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Nordamerika", "Europa", "Asien-Pazifik", "Lateinamerika"]
    chart_data.add_series("Liefertreue (%)", (92, 89, 95, 87))
    chart_data.add_series("Qualitätsindex", (88, 91, 93, 85))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.7), Inches(1.8), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series1 = plot.series[0]
    series1.format.fill.solid()
    series1.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)

    series2 = plot.series[1]
    series2.format.fill.solid()
    series2.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.maximum_scale = 100
    value_axis.has_title = False

    category_axis = chart.category_axis
    category_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(9)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(3.8), Inches(3.0),
        "Schlüsselerkenntnisse:\n\n"
        "• Asien-Pazifik führt bei Liefertreue und Qualität\n"
        "• Lateinamerika hat Optimierungspotenzial\n"
        "• Europa zeigt stabile Performance\n"
        "• Nordamerika benötigt Prozessanpassungen",
        font_size=12, bold=False, color=DARK_GREY
    )

    add_footer(slide, 3, 6)


def slide_04_logistics_flow(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, VERY_LIGHT_GREY)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "Logistikprozess")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.5),
        "Optimierter Logistikfluss",
        font_size=24, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY
    )

    shapes_data = [
        ("Rohstoff-\nbeschaffung", 0.7),
        ("Produktion", 2.6),
        ("Qualitäts-\nkontrolle", 4.5),
        ("Distribution", 6.4)
    ]

    shape_w = Inches(1.5)
    shape_h = Inches(1.2)
    y_pos = Inches(2.0)

    for i, (label, x_start) in enumerate(shapes_data):
        x = Inches(x_start)
        if i == 0:
            color = ACCENT_RED
        else:
            color = MEDIUM_GREY

        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y_pos, shape_w, shape_h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
        shape.line.fill.background()

        tf = shape.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = label
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

        if i < len(shapes_data) - 1:
            arrow_x = x + shape_w + Inches(0.15)
            arrow = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, arrow_x, y_pos + Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6))
            arrow.fill.solid()
            arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
            arrow.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.8), Inches(8.6), Inches(2.5),
        "Prozessoptimierungsergebnisse:\n\n"
        "• Beschaffungszeit um 22 % reduziert\n"
        "• Produktionsdurchsatz um 15 % gesteigert\n"
        "• Qualitätsrate auf 98,7 % verbessert\n"
        "• Distributionskosten um 10 % gesenkt",
        font_size=13, bold=False, color=DARK_GREY
    )

    add_footer(slide, 4, 6)


def slide_05_strategies(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "Optimierungsstrategien")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.5),
        "Maßnahmen zur Effizienzsteigerung",
        font_size=24, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY
    )

    card_w = Inches(3.0)
    card_h = Inches(1.5)
    gap_x = Inches(0.3)
    gap_y = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    row1_y = Inches(1.8)
    row2_y = row1_y + card_h + gap_y

    strategies = [
        ("Predictive Analytics", "Maschinelles Lernen zur Vorhersage von Lieferengpässen und Bedarfsprognosen."),
        ("Multi-Sourcing Strategie", "Diversifizierung der Lieferantenbasis für höhere Resilienz."),
        ("Lageroptimierung", "Automatisierte Bestandsverwaltung mit Echtzeit-Tracking."),
        ("Digitale Zwillinge", "Simulation der Lieferkette zur Identifikation von Engpässen.")
    ]

    positions = [
        (start_x, row1_y),
        (start_x + card_w + gap_x, row1_y),
        (start_x, row2_y),
        (start_x + card_w + gap_x, row2_y)
    ]

    for idx, ((title_text, body_text), pos) in enumerate(zip(strategies, positions)):
        add_card(slide, pos[0], pos[1], card_w, card_h, title_text, body_text,
                 bg_color=WHITE, border_color=ACCENT_RED if idx < 2 else MEDIUM_GREY)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 6)


def slide_06_roadmap(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_GREY)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "Umsetzungsplan")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.5),
        "Roadmap zur Implementierung",
        font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE
    )

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Prozessanalyse & Benchmarking"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Technologie-Integration"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Pilotprojekte"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Vollständige Implementierung")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(1.8)
    card_h = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(2.0)

    for i, (date_text, desc_text) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)

        card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y_pos, card_w, card_h)
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)
        card_shape.line.fill.background()

        tf = card_shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True

        p1 = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run1 = p1.add_run()
        run1.text = date_text
        run1.font.size = Pt(14)
        run1.font.bold = True
        run1.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)

        badge_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x + Inches(0.1), y_pos + Inches(0.25), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.3))
        badge_shape.fill.solid()
        badge_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
        badge_shape.line.fill.background()

        tf_badge = badge_shape.text_frame
        p_badge = tf_badge.paragraphs[0]
        run_badge = p_badge.add_run()
        run_badge.text = date_text
        run_badge.font.size = Pt(10)
        run_badge.font.bold = True
        run_badge.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)

        tf2 = card_shape.text_frame
        tf2.paragraphs[0].clear()
        p_main = tf2.paragraphs[0]
        run_main = p_main.add_run()
        run_main.text = desc_text
        run_main.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_main.font.bold = True
        run_main.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 6)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_metrics(prs)
    slide_03_supplier_chart(prs)
    slide_04_logistics_flow(prs)
    slide_05_strategies(prs)
    slide_06_roadmap(prs)

    prs.save("Supply_Chain_Optimization.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
